column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client

column.name: KUNNR
column.description: Customer Number

column.name: BUKRS
column.description: Company Code

column.name: AUFZD
column.description: Date as from when the payment history was recorded

column.name: JAH01
column.description: Calendar Year

column.name: MON01
column.description: Calendar Month

column.name: AGS01
column.description: Gross Total of Cleared Items without Cash Discount Loss

column.name: VZS01
column.description: Average arrears with cash discount payments

column.name: AGN01
column.description: Gross Total of Cleared Items with Cash Discount Not Taken

column.name: VZN01
column.description: Average Arrears for Payments Where No Cash Discount Taken

column.name: ANZ01
column.description: Number of Incoming Payments during the Period
